title: No Mirror Level Limits

posts.author: Uriel (Uriel Klein)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is currently a limit on how many levels of mirroring can be used.
Once you have mirrored 2-levels deep, you can’t mirror to another board.
This makes it very hard to use Monday as a real-time database with accurate data and information.

posts.author: DianaAngheluta (Diana Angheluta)
posts.cookedHtml: Check this app - monday.com: Apps Marketplace
